channel.title: Crypto on Nemath Ahmed
channel.description: Recent content in Crypto on Nemath Ahmed

item.title: The Crypto Consensus Mechanism
item.description: The Crypto Consensus Mechanism Originally Published in Predict Who’s the authority here? Cryptocurrency has been in the limelight for the past few months. With its universal and decentralized aspects, many aren’t shying away from calling it the currency of the future. There are more than four thousand cryptocurrencies in existence, and their number has been on the rise. Photo by Dmitry Demidko on Unsplash For jumping on the bandwagon of the cryptocurrency craze, many startups in the past few years have been considering Initial Coin Offerings or ICOs.
